summary.xray_call: Real runtime with visible prompt layers.
summary.verdict: This repo mixes real implementation with prompt/config behavior surfaces; it is not prompt-only.

real_implementation: The repo contains real packaging/integration logic for multiple AI tool surfaces.
prompt_config_structure: Behavior is primarily defined through prompt/rule assets rather than executable runtime code.
Workflow, handoff, and memory behavior is largely expressed as instructions in docs/prompts.
Behavior is adapted across tool ecosystems via repo-specific prompt packaging.
